sections.title: Using a guthix balance on a Vampyre Juvinate or Vampyre Juvenile

lines.speaker: Miala
lines.text: Thanks so much for saving me from being a vampyre. Here, take this certificate, I'm sorry but it's all I can offer as a reward.

lines.speaker: Miala
lines.text: Thanks for changing me back, it must have been hard for you. I must be off now.
